title: TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 140 to 160 in Tamil Nadu (Ordered by Average Cutoff, Lowest to Highest)

detail.title: TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 140 to 160 in Tamil Nadu (Ordered by Average Cutoff, Lowest to Highest)
detail.short_info: Find the complete list of TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 140 to 160 in Tamil Nadu with average cutoffs, fees, ratings, and counselling details for 2025-26 admissions.

content.text: TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 140 to 160 in Tamil Nadu offer good opportunities for students with moderate scores in the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counselling. These include reputed private self-financing colleges, university campuses, and some government institutions where closing cutoffs (especially for reserved categories) fall in this range.

sections.heading: Overview of TNEA Colleges with Average Cutoff 140-160

content.text: TNEA admissions are based on +2 marks (Maths, Physics, Chemistry) normalized to a 200-mark scale. Colleges in the 140-160 range are suitable for many branches like CSE, ECE, Mechanical, Civil, etc., depending on category and round. Data is compiled from previous years' trends (closing cutoffs vary yearly).

sections.heading: TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 140 to 160 in Tamil Nadu (Ordered by Average Cutoff, Lowest to Highest)

content.text: Here is the compiled and ordered table based on the provided average TNEA Cutoff Marks (out of 200). I have included all colleges from your data within or near the 140-160 range, plus those with ranges overlapping (e.g., up to 177+ but closing lower).

content.text: TNEA counselling is centralized by the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Tamil Nadu. Steps include:

sections.heading: Factors to Consider When Choosing a College

items: Placement Records & NIRF Ranking — Prioritize colleges with good CSE/ECE placements.
Fees vs ROI — Compare annual fees (Rs. 50k–1.1L) with scholarship options.
Infrastructure & Accreditation — Look for NBA/NAAC accreditation and autonomous status.
Location — Chennai/Coimbatore colleges may have better industry exposure.
Branch Availability — Popular branches close at higher cutoffs; opt for core branches if needed.

sections.heading: Top Branches Available in 140-160 Cutoff Range

content.text: Common branches: Computer Science, Electronics & Communication, Mechanical, Civil, IT, Electrical, etc. (varies by college and category).
